mapper.select: SELECT unique_sign FROM user_operate WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT op.id FROM user_operate u LEFT JOIN operate_permission op ON u.unique_sign = op.unique_sign WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_delete = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_operate (user_id, unique_sign, type, is_delete, create_at, update_at) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.uniqueSign}, #{item.type}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.createAt}, #{item.updateAt} )
